senses.gloss: flat-nosed, camoys, having the bone of the nose wide and depressed, having the tip flat

examples.text: وتقطعها بحديدة حادة شبه المبضع الأفطس وهذا صورتها […]
examples.english: And you cut it with a sharp iron implement like a flat-tipped scalpel and this is how it looks […]

etymology.text: Color or defect adjective from the root ف ط س (f ṭ s).
